parameters.query: SELECT key, value FROM automation_config WHERE key LIKE 'appointments_%';

WITH upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO appointments (
    source_system, external_appointment_id, contact_id, lead_id, service_code, service_name, unit_code, professional_code, scheduled_start, scheduled_end, status, confirmation_status, idempotency_key, raw_payload
  ) VALUES (
    {{ $json.sql_source_system }},
    {{ $json.sql_external_appointment_id }},
    NULL,
    NULL,
    {{ $json.sql_service_code }},
    {{ $json.sql_service_name }},
    {{ $json.sql_unit_code }},
    {{ $json.sql_professional_code }},
    {{ $json.sql_scheduled_start }}::timestamptz,
    {{ $json.sql_scheduled_end }}::timestamptz,
    {{ $json.sql_status }},
    {{ $json.sql_confirmation_status }},
    {{ $json.sql_idempotency_key }},
    '{{ $json._safePayload }}'::jsonb
  )
  ON CONFLICT (source_system, external_appointment_id) DO UPDATE SET
    service_code = EXCLUDED.service_code,
    service_name = EXCLUDED.service_name,
    unit_code = EXCLUDED.unit_code,
    professional_code = EXCLUDED.professional_code,
    scheduled_start = EXCLUDED.scheduled_start,
    scheduled_end = EXCLUDED.scheduled_end,
    status = EXCLUDED.status,
    confirmation_status = EXCLUDED.confirmation_status,
    idempotency_key = EXCLUDED.idempotency_key,
    raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload,
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id, source_system, external_appointment_id, status, confirmation_status, idempotency_key, scheduled_start
), audit AS (
  INSERT INTO audit_events (actor_type, actor_id, event_type, entity_type, entity_id, details_json)
  SELECT 'n8n_workflow', 'agenda-ingest-001', 'appointment_ingested', 'appointments', upsert.id,
    json_build_object('workflow', 'Agenda Ingest - Appointments Read', 'source_system', upsert.source_system, 'external_appointment_id', upsert.external_appointment_id, 'status', upsert.status, 'confirmation_status', upsert.confirmation_status, 'idempotency_key', upsert.idempotency_key, 'client_name', {{ $json.sql_client_name }}, 'source_status_name', {{ $json.sql_raw_status_name }}, 'scheduled_start', upsert.scheduled_start::text)::jsonb
  FROM upsert
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT upsert.id, upsert.source_system, upsert.external_appointment_id, upsert.status, upsert.confirmation_status, upsert.idempotency_key, upsert.scheduled_start, {{ $json.sql_client_name }} AS client_name, {{ $json.sql_service_name }} AS service_name, {{ $json.sql_raw_status_name }} AS raw_status_name, {{ $json.sql_followup_enabled }}::boolean AS followup_enabled, audit.id AS audit_id FROM upsert, audit;

WITH enqueue AS (
  INSERT INTO command_queue (command_type, target_system, entity_type, entity_id, payload_json, idempotency_key, created_by)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.command_type }}', '{{ $json.target_system }}', '{{ $json.entity_type }}', '{{ $json.entity_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json._safePayload }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json._safeIdempotencyKey }}', 'agenda-ingest-001')
  ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id, idempotency_key, status
), audit AS (
  INSERT INTO audit_events (actor_type, actor_id, event_type, entity_type, entity_id, details_json)
  SELECT 'n8n_workflow', 'agenda-ingest-001', 'appointment_followup_enqueued', 'command_queue', enqueue.id,
    json_build_object('workflow_action', 'send_confirmation_followup', 'command_type', '{{ $json.command_type }}', 'external_appointment_id', '{{ $json._safeExternalAppointmentId }}', 'idempotency_key', '{{ $json._safeIdempotencyKey }}')::jsonb
  FROM enqueue
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT enqueue.id, enqueue.idempotency_key, enqueue.status, audit.id as audit_id FROM enqueue LEFT JOIN audit ON true;
